basic_details.job_title: TNAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Teaching Assistant, Young Professional and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Teaching Assistant / Senior Research Fellow / Research Associate / Young Professional
basic_details.short_information: The Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) has officially announced the Teaching Assistant, Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate, and Young Professional Recruitment 2026 with 8 openings. The recruitment notification has been published on the official TNAU website. Candidates holding a Ph.D., Master's Degree, or M.Sc. (Agriculture) with the required eligibility criteria can attend the walk-in interview on 22 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and view the walkin interview details are provided below.

qualification.details: Teaching Assistant (Post 1): Ph.D. in Processing and Food Engineering / Food Process Engineering / Food Technology Teaching Assistant (Post 2): Master's degree in Food Science and Nutrition / Food Technology Senior Research Fellow: M.Sc. (Agri.) in Agronomy with two years experience Research Associate: Ph.D. in Food Science and Nutrition / Food Technology with four years experience Young Professional I: M.Sc. in Food Science and Nutrition / Ph.D. discipline

vacancy_details.Interview Place: The Dean (Engineering), Agricultural Engineering College and Research Institute, Coimbatore.
The Dean, Community Science College and Research Institute, Madurai

post_wise_breakdown.interview_place: The Dean (Engineering), Agricultural Engineering College and Research Institute, Coimbatore.
The Dean, Community Science College and Research Institute, Madurai

salary_details.details: Teaching Assistant (Post 1): Rs. 62,000/- p.m. (With NET) / Rs. 52,000/- p.m. (Without NET) Teaching Assistant (Post 2): Rs. 52,000/- p.m. (With NET) / Rs. 45,000/- p.m. (Without NET) Senior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. (Without NET) / Rs. 30,000/- p.m. (Without NET) Research Associate: Rs. 67,000/- p.m. (With NET) / Rs. 42,000/- p.m. (With NET) Young Professional I: Rs. 42,000/- p.m. (With NET)

rows.tamil_nadu_agricultural_university: Teaching Assistant / Senior Research Fellow / Research Associate / Young Professional

content_sections.heading: TNAU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TNAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TNAU Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.interview_place: The Dean (Engineering), Agricultural Engineering College and Research Institute, Coimbatore.
The Dean, Community Science College and Research Institute, Madurai

content_sections.heading: TNAU Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Teaching Assistant (Post 1): Ph.D. in Processing and Food Engineering / Food Process Engineering / Food Technology Teaching Assistant (Post 2): Master's degree in Food Science and Nutrition / Food Technology Senior Research Fellow: M.Sc. (Agri.) in Agronomy with two years experience Research Associate: Ph.D. in Food Science and Nutrition / Food Technology with four years experience Young Professional I: M.Sc. in Food Science and Nutrition / Ph.D. discipline

content_sections.heading: TNAU Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Teaching Assistant (Post 1): Rs. 62,000/- p.m. (With NET) / Rs. 52,000/- p.m. (Without NET) Teaching Assistant (Post 2): Rs. 52,000/- p.m. (With NET) / Rs. 45,000/- p.m. (Without NET) Senior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. (Without NET) / Rs. 30,000/- p.m. (Without NET) Research Associate: Rs. 67,000/- p.m. (With NET) / Rs. 42,000/- p.m. (With NET) Young Professional I: Rs. 42,000/- p.m. (With NET)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for TNAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on multiple dates: 22nd July 2026, 23rd July 2026, and 27th July 2026. Candidates should choose one of these dates to attend.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by TNAU?
faq.answer: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University has announced a total of 8 vacancies for various posts including Teaching Assistant, Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate, and Young Professional.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the TNAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from a Master's degree in Food Science and Nutrition/Food Technology to a Ph.D. in relevant fields like Processing and Food Engineering or Food Science and Nutrition.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for TNAU recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant posts?
faq.answer: For Teaching Assistant posts, the salary ranges from Rs. 52,000/- p.m. to Rs. 62,000/- p.m., depending on whether the candidate possesses NET qualification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these TNAU positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates are advised to bring all necessary original documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at the TNAU office in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. Specific timings should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job at TNAU?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, offering opportunities for candidates to work on specific projects or roles within the university.
